title: ReplicationReplicateDetailsReplicaStatus
description: Represents the current or historical status of a shard replica involved in a replication operation, including its operational state and any associated errors.

state.description: The current operational state of the replica during the replication process.

whenStartedUnixMs.description: The UNIX timestamp in ms when this state was first entered. This is an approximate time and so should not be used for precise timing.

errors.description: A list of error messages encountered by this replica during the replication operation, if any.
